## AI Summary
The SeeYA 0.49 OLED microdisplay is a 1080P FHD 1920x1080 resolution module with 3000 nits brightness, used in AR and VR headsets. It features a 50000:1 contrast ratio and 20000 nits luminance. The display is based on single-crystal silicon transistors.
